headline: How To Earn $500 A Month From Lamb Weston Stock Ahead Of Q3 Earnings
summary: Lamb Weston has an annual dividend yield of 3.71% ($1.52). So, how can investors exploit its dividend yield to pocket a regular $500 monthly?
